summary: Verified Vidur AI IBM watsonx.ai rebrand + bug fix. Backend 7/7 pytest tests pass. Frontend: home/create pages render, rebrand clean (no AICTE/Edunet/Internship/etc.), nav shows 'AI Business Analyst Copilot' tagline, hero has 'investor-ready business blueprint', health banner NOT shown when backend reachable, form submit -> progress-panel appears -> WATSONX_API_KEY informative error surfaces in toast (bug fix confirmed).
action_items: Copilot page (/copilot/:id) and Results page (/results/:id) executive-summary + open-copilot testids could NOT be tested end-to-end because DB has zero blueprints (watsonx key blank prevents creation). Recommend seeding one mock blueprint document in MongoDB for future UI regression testing of Results + Copilot flows.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py 300+ lines is acceptable; well-organized. No _id leak (excluded via projection).
chat_service._build_prompt truncates blueprint JSON at 12k chars — good safety cap.
_run_generation catches broad Exception and stores str(exc) as job.error — this is exactly what enables the humanized error surface. Good.
seed_data_creation: None. Suggest main agent seed a demo blueprint doc to enable Results/Copilot UI regression testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WATSONX_API_KEY intentionally blank -> all jobs error with 'WATSONX_API_KEY is not configured...'. This is the fixed error path that must surface to user. /api/blueprints returns []; Results and Copilot UI routes cannot be tested without a seeded blueprint doc in db.blueprints. All backend endpoints (health, jobs, suggested-prompts, chat 404, chat history) return correct data. sections[0]=='executive_summary'.
rca of the issue: Original bug: generic 'Could not start generation. Try again.' shown regardless of actual failure. Fix verified: (1) POST /api/blueprint/jobs returns 200 immediately (enqueue). (2) Backend _run_generation stores str(exc) into job.error. (3) Frontend polls GET /api/blueprint/jobs/{id}, and when status=='error', humanizeError() picks up job.error and displays it in a toast. Confirmed live: toast displayed 'Watsonx blueprint generation failed for most sections: executive_summary: WATSONX_API_KEY is not configured. Set it in backend/.env before starting the server. | problem_statement: ...'. Health-error banner correctly hidden when GET /api/ returns 200.
